reviews.review_title: A bit buggy yet overall it’s good
reviews.review_description: It is very fun to play and i liked the car mechanics yet while using said car i got lauched into a black hole in space. Like literally. Everything around me started warping.

developer_response.body: Glad You Liked It! You Just Need To Not Grab Vehicles  With Your Hands To Prevent This Issue.

reviews.review_description: This game is truly next gen vr and I would sell all my organs just for the chance to experience this

reviews.review_title: Its wants to work when it wants to
reviews.review_description: Physics is made it a different way, cars are hard to get used to and bounce, besides that and others its fun

developer_response.body: Thank You. Please Keep In Mind That BOB'sLAB Is Still Beign Developed By One Person And Is Still In Beta. More Fixes Will Come In Future Updates
